entries.definition:
sh-ʾ-m the left-hand side, wrong side, bad omen. Of this root, مشأمة mashʾamatun occurs in the Qurʾan three times.
مَشْأَمَة mashʾamatun [v. n.; n. of place] left-hand side, leftward direction; the wrong side, bad omen *(90:19) أَصْحَابُ الْمَشْأَمَةِ the condemned [lit. people of the left-hand side].
